ON 6/4/2018 I PICKED UP MY VEHICLE FROM THE SERVICE DEPARTMENT AT MY LOCAL DEALERSHIP AFTER TAKING IT IN FOR THE ABS AND TRACTION CONTROL LIGHTS BEING ON AND LOSS OF POWER. THE DEALERSHIP ADVISED THEY DID AN UPDATE ON THE POWER CONTROL MODEL AND FIXED A WHEEL SPEED SENSOR. WHILE

TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2018 DODGE JOURNEY. THE CONTACT STATED THAT WHILE DRIVING AT NIGHT, THE DRIVER'S AND PASSENGER'S SIDE HEADLIGHTS FAILED TO ADEQUATELY ILLUMINATE THE ROADWAY. UPON INSPECTION, IT WAS DISCOVERED THAT WATER AND CONDENSATION WERE PRESENT INSIDE THE HEADLIGHT HO

narrative.headline: What 2018 Dodge Journey owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 217 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (32% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
